title: Configure Supabase
description: Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env (see README Quick Start). Enable auth providers in the Supabase dashboard. For Google OAuth, follow documentation/DOC_SUPABASE_GOOGLE_OAUTH.md. Verify auth via ProfileMenu sign-in once configured.

title: Configure Cloudflare Workers Builds (fork deploy)
description:
AGENT ONE-SHOT BRIEF — run this after Supabase env vars exist. Skills: .agents/skills/quick-piv/SKILL.md (XS/S) or plan+implement (if rulesets/dashboard need research). SSOT: documentation/DOC_CLOUDFLARE_WORKERS.md, documentation/DOC_SUPABASE_GOOGLE_OAUTH.md. Work on feature/* → develop; never main. User tests success; do not claim done without their confirmation.

TARGET: GitHub = CI gate only (ci.yml on PR+push to main/develop; rulesets require PR + green test check; NO deploy workflow; NO CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secret). Cloudflare Workers Builds = sole deploy path (push → build+deploy; develop → preview URL, main → production). Same Supabase project for preview and production.

DISCOVER FIRST (ask user when unknown):
• Unique Worker name (lowercase, hyphens) for wrangler.jsonc name
• Cloudflare org account_id (not a personal account) — dashboard or wrangler whoami
• Production custom domain (optional) with DNS on Cloudflare
• Any old Cloudflare Pages project to retire after Worker serves the domain
• All VITE_* keys needed at build time (from .env): at minimum VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
• On the fork: CI job name test + integration_id 15368 — verify via gh api repos/OWNER/REPO/rulesets (classic branch protection returns 404; use rulesets API)

IMPLEMENT (fork commits):
1. wrangler.jsonc — set name; compatibility_date today; workers_dev true; preview_urls true; assets.directory ./dist; assets.not_found_handling single-page-application; add account_id; add routes [{ pattern: <domain>, custom_domain: true }] when using a custom domain. Do NOT set pages_build_output_dir. Remove public/_redirects SPA rule if present (conflicts with not_found_handling → Infinite loop detected).
2. GitHub — delete any deploy-cloudflare-*.yml; keep ci.yml unchanged. Create or verify rulesets on main (~DEFAULT_BRANCH) and develop: pull_request required, allowed_merge_methods merge/squash/rebase, required_status_checks context test integration_id 15368 strict false, non_fast_forward, deletion.
3. package.json already has deploy and preview:worker scripts; wrangler is a devDependency.

DASHBOARD (agent often cannot API this — Workers Builds needs user API token, not wrangler OAuth): Cloudflare → Workers & Pages → Connect to Git → Production branch main; Build command pnpm install && pnpm run build; Deploy command npx wrangler deploy; Root directory EMPTY (stale value causes root directory not found); Build variables NODE_VERSION=20, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, plus every VITE_* the app needs; enable non-production branch builds for develop.

AUTH: Add production URL + develop preview URL to Supabase Authentication → URL configuration (Site URL + Redirect URLs). For Google, add matching JavaScript origins and callback paths per DOC_SUPABASE_GOOGLE_OAUTH.md (include /auth/callback or your app auth route).

RETIRE: After Worker serves the domain, disable auto-deploy on old Pages project then delete it.

GOTCHAS: account_id in wrangler.jsonc when multiple CF accounts visible; live site must load /assets/*.js in view-source (not /src/main.tsx); emergency local deploy only via pnpm deploy.

GATES: pnpm lint, type-check, build, validate:structure pass; PR with failing lint stays blocked until CI green; Workers Builds green on latest main and develop; login works on production and develop preview.

title: Define app vision
description: Collaborate with the coding agent to fill documentation/DOC_APP_VISION.md (problem, persona, app role). Replace placeholder bullets with real prose and change Vision status from DRAFT to ACTIVE when complete.

title: Configure Airtable (optional)
description: Optional — skip or archive this task if unused. Add VITE_AIRTABLE_API_KEY, VITE_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID, and VITE_AIRTABLE_TABLE_ID to .env. Use .agents/skills/airtable-inspect/SKILL.md for schema then sample rows.

title: Configure Theme
description: Customize MUI theme via src/shared/theme/ (themeLoader.ts and related tokens). Match brand colors, typography, and dark/light mode defaults. Verify changes in the running dev app.
